query: SELECT sr.id, sr.userId, sr.scenarioId, sr.status, sr.startedAt, sr.completedAt, s.code as scenario_code FROM scenario_runs sr LEFT JOIN scenarios s ON sr.scenarioId = s.id WHERE sr.userId = 3990014 ORDER BY sr.completedAt DESC;
